lost_eye.title: Craft the Lost Eye (center: Fragment of Rebirth + other ingredients — see eye_recipes.js)

place_lost.title: Place the Lost Eye in the End Portal frame

subtitle.text: It was not lost. It was buried. Now you carry it.

description: The Lost Eye is the Sky Civilization's inheritance.
It required: Fragment of Rebirth (Kukulkan kill),
Some of these ingredients are from chapters you haven't reached.
If you have the Fragment of Rebirth, secure it.
The remaining ingredients arrive in Ch15-16.
If you have all components now: craft it. Place it.
Two frames filled is two confirmations given.
If not: the hunt continues in parallel.
→ Craft the Lost Eye when all ingredients are collected [check]
→ Place the Lost Eye in the frame [check]
